# Vanishing RISC-V Benchmark Comparison

<!-- Code generated by make bench-vanishing-compare-doc; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Generated by `make bench-vanishing-compare-doc`.

Each row measures one generated honest vanishing benchmark case. The zkc RISC-V runner records phase-marker checkpoints so transcript coin replay and `vanishing.verify` are reported separately.

## Summary

| Metric | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Case selector | `all` |
| Cases measured | 83 |
| Fastest | `6 Vanishing/ConstantColumn` (166,036 cycles) |
| Slowest | `80 RangeCheckCompiler/LargeBound` (7,239,179 cycles) |
| Zig release mode | `small` |
| Git commit | `df0c1d24c` |
| Zig | `0.16.0` |
| zkc | `mod	github.com/consensys/go-corset	v1.2.18-0.20260521022840-414e7b73971e` |
| zkc main | `bench/riscv_main_bench.zkc` |
| Logs | `zig-out/vanishing-bench/case-<index>.log` |

## Reproduce

```bash
cd verifier-ray
make bench-vanishing-compare-doc VANISHING_BENCH_CASES=all VANISHING_BENCH_RELEASE=small
```
